name: safety-hub
description: - Node.js with Express.js - React - Radix UI - PostgreSQL - Prisma - Docker

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.db-shell: docker exec -it safetyhub-db psql -U safetyhub -d safetyhub
scripts.db-studio: cd backend && npx prisma studio --browser none --port 5555
